# Codex Test Specs

This appendix is generated from chapter-level `codex_tests` in `book_structure.json`.

No result is recorded here unless a test has actually been implemented and run.

| Chapter ID | Chapter | Test spec | Implementation status | Result status |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `asi-is-a-stack-not-a-model` | ASI Is a Stack, Not a Model | Layer-boundary audit | planned | not run |
| `asi-is-a-stack-not-a-model` | ASI Is a Stack, Not a Model | Source-to-layer traceability review | planned | not run |
| `asi-is-a-stack-not-a-model` | ASI Is a Stack, Not a Model | Claim-support label audit | planned | not run |
| `the-efficient-asi-hypothesis` | The Efficient ASI Hypothesis | Lower-cost candidate negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no route-search completeness or cost-estimate accuracy claim |
| `the-efficient-asi-hypothesis` | The Efficient ASI Hypothesis | Open-obligation residual negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no residual-burden measurement or utility-preservation claim |
| `the-efficient-asi-hypothesis` | The Efficient ASI Hypothesis | Minimum viable route test | planned | not run |
| `the-efficient-asi-hypothesis` | The Efficient ASI Hypothesis | Residual burden accounting test | planned | not run |
| `the-efficient-asi-hypothesis` | The Efficient ASI Hypothesis | Utility-preserving compression test | planned | not run |
| `system-boundaries-and-authority` | System Boundaries and Authority | Authority ceiling preservation test | implemented | passes via synthetic authority transition harness and strengthened finite Authority Lean decision envelope; no runtime enforcement claim |
| `system-boundaries-and-authority` | System Boundaries and Authority | Permission separation test | implemented | passes via synthetic authority transition harness |
| `system-boundaries-and-authority` | System Boundaries and Authority | Confused-deputy scenario | implemented | passes expected-invalid synthetic denial fixture; no runtime enforcement claim |
| `failure-modes-of-ungoverned-intelligence` | Failure Modes of Ungoverned Intelligence | Authority creep scenario | implemented | passes via Lean build |
| `failure-modes-of-ungoverned-intelligence` | Failure Modes of Ungoverned Intelligence | Context pollution scenario | implemented | passes via Lean build |
| `failure-modes-of-ungoverned-intelligence` | Failure Modes of Ungoverned Intelligence | Evaluator drift scenario | implemented | passes via Lean build |
| `failure-modes-of-ungoverned-intelligence` | Failure Modes of Ungoverned Intelligence | Unverified-claim scenario | implemented | passes via Lean build |
| `evidence-states-and-claim-discipline` | Evidence States and Claim Discipline | Support-state transition test | implemented | validated locally |
| `evidence-states-and-claim-discipline` | Evidence States and Claim Discipline | Claim ledger completeness test | planned | not run |
| `evidence-states-and-claim-discipline` | Evidence States and Claim Discipline | Evidence bundle completeness test | planned | not run |
| `evidence-states-and-claim-discipline` | Evidence States and Claim Discipline | Changelog consistency audit | planned | not run |
| `human-intent-as-a-formal-input` | Human Intent as a Formal Input | Intent resolution route proof | implemented | passes via Lean build; finite structured-record route only |
| `human-intent-as-a-formal-input` | Human Intent as a Formal Input | Intent parsing ambiguity test | planned | not run |
| `human-intent-as-a-formal-input` | Human Intent as a Formal Input | Authority extraction test | planned | not run |
| `human-intent-as-a-formal-input` | Human Intent as a Formal Input | Stop-condition preservation test | planned | not run |
| `human-intent-as-a-formal-input` | Human Intent as a Formal Input | Re-contract trigger test | planned | not run |
| `human-intent-as-a-formal-input` | Human Intent as a Formal Input | Bounded-default audit | planned | not run |
| `constitutional-alignment-substrate` | Constitutional Alignment: Agency, Dignity, and Corrigibility | Constitutional consistency test | implemented | passing via synthetic constitutional alignment harness; no deployed constitutional-alignment or moral-correctness claim |
| `constitutional-alignment-substrate` | Constitutional Alignment: Agency, Dignity, and Corrigibility | Predicate-conflict routing test | implemented | passing via synthetic constitutional alignment harness; no runtime conflict-resolution or review-quality claim |
| `constitutional-alignment-substrate` | Constitutional Alignment: Agency, Dignity, and Corrigibility | Constitutional migration test | implemented | passing via synthetic constitutional alignment harness; no deployed migration or rollback behavior claim |
| `constitutional-alignment-substrate` | Constitutional Alignment: Agency, Dignity, and Corrigibility | Self-modification ethics scenario | implemented | passing via synthetic constitutional alignment harness; no self-modification safety or predicate-translation adequacy claim |
| `constitutional-alignment-substrate` | Constitutional Alignment: Agency, Dignity, and Corrigibility | Power-without-care scenario | implemented | passing via synthetic constitutional alignment harness; no runtime least-sufficient-power enforcement claim |
| `constitutional-alignment-substrate` | Constitutional Alignment: Agency, Dignity, and Corrigibility | Agency-preservation scenario | implemented | passing via synthetic agency rights harness; no deployed agency-preservation or dignity-preservation claim |
| `constitutional-alignment-substrate` | Constitutional Alignment: Agency, Dignity, and Corrigibility | Material-usability rights test | implemented | passing via synthetic agency rights harness; no real consent-quality or rights-usability claim |
| `constitutional-alignment-substrate` | Constitutional Alignment: Agency, Dignity, and Corrigibility | Timing-before-effect test | implemented | passing via synthetic agency rights harness; no deployed pre-effect review enforcement claim |
| `constitutional-alignment-substrate` | Constitutional Alignment: Agency, Dignity, and Corrigibility | Corrigibility pathway test | implemented | passing via synthetic agency rights harness; no deployed shutdown, rollback, or correction-pathway claim |
| `constitutional-alignment-substrate` | Constitutional Alignment: Agency, Dignity, and Corrigibility | High-impact approval test | implemented | passing via synthetic agency rights harness; no approval-service quality or reviewer-independence claim |
| `moral-uncertainty-and-value-conflict` | Moral Uncertainty, Value Conflict, and Contestable Governance | Value conflict classification test | implemented | passing via synthetic value conflict harness; no moral-correctness or classification-quality claim |
| `moral-uncertainty-and-value-conflict` | Moral Uncertainty, Value Conflict, and Contestable Governance | Review escalation test | implemented | passing via synthetic value conflict harness; no reviewer-independence or review-quality claim |
| `moral-uncertainty-and-value-conflict` | Moral Uncertainty, Value Conflict, and Contestable Governance | Residual uncertainty preservation test | implemented | passing via synthetic value conflict harness; no runtime policy or deployed decision claim |
| `moral-uncertainty-and-value-conflict` | Moral Uncertainty, Value Conflict, and Contestable Governance | Audit-record availability test | implemented | passing via synthetic governance rights harness; no institutional auditability or legal-rights claim |
| `moral-uncertainty-and-value-conflict` | Moral Uncertainty, Value Conflict, and Contestable Governance | Exit-path preservation test | implemented | passing via synthetic governance rights harness; no runtime portability or deployed exit-right claim |
| `moral-uncertainty-and-value-conflict` | Moral Uncertainty, Value Conflict, and Contestable Governance | Fork-right safety test | implemented | passing via synthetic governance rights harness; no deployed fork enforcement or legal-rights claim |
| `stable-capability-fields` | Stable Capability Fields | Qualification predicate test | implemented | validated locally by synthetic fixtures; runtime route quality not run |
| `stable-capability-fields` | Stable Capability Fields | Route validity test | implemented | validated locally by synthetic fixtures |
| `stable-capability-fields` | Stable Capability Fields | Authority non-escalation test | implemented | validated locally by synthetic fixtures; deployed authority enforcement not run |
| `stable-capability-fields` | Stable Capability Fields | Rollback readiness test | implemented | validated locally by synthetic fixtures; deployed rollback not run |
| `stable-capability-fields` | Stable Capability Fields | SCF lifecycle route proof | implemented | passes via Lean build; no deployed lifecycle enforcement claim |
| `capability-replacement-and-rollback` | Capability Replacement and Rollback | Replacement transaction test | implemented | validated locally by synthetic fixtures; deployed replacement behavior not run |
| `capability-replacement-and-rollback` | Capability Replacement and Rollback | Regression preservation test | implemented | validated locally by synthetic fixtures; real regression suite not run |
| `capability-replacement-and-rollback` | Capability Replacement and Rollback | Rollback execution dry run | implemented | validated locally by synthetic fixtures; production rollback not executed |
| `capability-replacement-and-rollback` | Capability Replacement and Rollback | Replacement transaction route proof | implemented | passes via Lean build; no deployed replacement execution claim |
| `security-kernel-and-digital-scifs` | Security Kernel and Digital SCIFs | Secret-handle substitution test | implemented | passing via synthetic security kernel harness; no secret-handle safety or sandbox-isolation claim |
| `security-kernel-and-digital-scifs` | Security Kernel and Digital SCIFs | Handle lease expiry/reuse test | implemented | passing via synthetic security kernel harness; no deployed lease or revocation behavior claim |
| `security-kernel-and-digital-scifs` | Security Kernel and Digital SCIFs | SCIF least-privilege test | implemented | passing via synthetic security kernel harness; no least-privilege context or side-channel safety claim |
| `security-kernel-and-digital-scifs` | Security Kernel and Digital SCIFs | Sanitized-output residual test | implemented | passing via synthetic security kernel harness; no leak-prevention or summary-safety claim |
| `security-kernel-and-digital-scifs` | Security Kernel and Digital SCIFs | Security-overhead budget preservation test | implemented | passing via synthetic security kernel harness; no runtime budget enforcement or security-economics claim |
| `security-kernel-and-digital-scifs` | Security Kernel and Digital SCIFs | Prompt-injection containment scenario | implemented | passing via synthetic security kernel harness; no runtime prompt-injection containment claim |
| `security-kernel-and-digital-scifs` | Security Kernel and Digital SCIFs | Security kernel route proof | implemented | passes via Lean build; finite authority-use route coverage only |
| `recursive-self-improvement-boundaries` | Recursive Self-Improvement Boundaries | Protected-invariant preservation test | implemented | validated locally by synthetic fixtures; deployed recursive self-improvement behavior not run |
| `recursive-self-improvement-boundaries` | Recursive Self-Improvement Boundaries | Evaluator independence test | implemented | validated locally by synthetic fixtures; broader self-improvement behavior not run |
| `recursive-self-improvement-boundaries` | Recursive Self-Improvement Boundaries | Self-improvement rollback scenario | implemented | validated locally by synthetic fixtures; live self-improvement rollback not run |
| `recursive-self-improvement-boundaries` | Recursive Self-Improvement Boundaries | Self-improvement transition route proof | implemented | passes via Lean build; finite transition-route coverage only |
| `intent-to-execution-contracts` | Command Contracts: From Intent to Executable Work | Intent and trace fixture validation | implemented | passes via protocol fixture validation; shape only |
| `intent-to-execution-contracts` | Command Contracts: From Intent to Executable Work | Contract field completeness test | implemented | passes via synthetic plan-execution contract harness |
| `intent-to-execution-contracts` | Command Contracts: From Intent to Executable Work | Constraint preservation test | implemented | passes via synthetic plan-execution contract harness |
| `intent-to-execution-contracts` | Command Contracts: From Intent to Executable Work | Artifact traceability test | implemented | passes via synthetic plan-execution contract harness; no runtime artifact acceptance claim |
| `intent-to-execution-contracts` | Command Contracts: From Intent to Executable Work | Command schema validation test | implemented | passes via synthetic plan-execution contract harness and Lean missing-field negative case |
| `intent-to-execution-contracts` | Command Contracts: From Intent to Executable Work | Failure-behavior declaration test | implemented | passes via synthetic plan-execution contract harness; no deployed dispatcher claim |
| `intent-to-execution-contracts` | Command Contracts: From Intent to Executable Work | Execution dispatch route proof | implemented | passes via Lean build; finite dispatch-route coverage only |
| `intent-to-execution-contracts` | Command Contracts: From Intent to Executable Work | Prompt override scenario | implemented | passes via Lean hidden-override negative case; no deployed parser or model claim |
| `intent-to-execution-contracts` | Command Contracts: From Intent to Executable Work | Field-confidence audit | planned | not run |
| `intent-to-execution-contracts` | Command Contracts: From Intent to Executable Work | Authority-inference block test | planned | not run |
| `planning-as-a-control-layer` | Planning as a Control Layer: DAGs and Intelligence Arbitrage | Decomposition accuracy test | planned | not run |
| `planning-as-a-control-layer` | Planning as a Control Layer: DAGs and Intelligence Arbitrage | Dependency ordering test | implemented | passes via synthetic plan-execution contract harness |
| `planning-as-a-control-layer` | Planning as a Control Layer: DAGs and Intelligence Arbitrage | Context-demand prediction test | planned | not run |
| `planning-as-a-control-layer` | Planning as a Control Layer: DAGs and Intelligence Arbitrage | Runtime replanning test | planned | not run |
| `planning-as-a-control-layer` | Planning as a Control Layer: DAGs and Intelligence Arbitrage | DAG acyclicity test | implemented | passes via synthetic plan-execution contract harness; no deployed scheduler claim |
| `planning-as-a-control-layer` | Planning as a Control Layer: DAGs and Intelligence Arbitrage | Capability tier assignment test | planned | not run |
| `planning-as-a-control-layer` | Planning as a Control Layer: DAGs and Intelligence Arbitrage | Failed-quality fallback finite-record proof | implemented | builds in AsiStackProofs.PlanForge; no deployed scheduler claim |
| `planning-as-a-control-layer` | Planning as a Control Layer: DAGs and Intelligence Arbitrage | Plan-control dispatch route proof | implemented | passes via Lean build; finite dispatch-route coverage only |
| `cognitive-compilation-and-semantic-ir` | Cognitive Compilation and Semantic IR | Requirement preservation test | implemented | passes via synthetic plan-execution contract harness |
| `cognitive-compilation-and-semantic-ir` | Cognitive Compilation and Semantic IR | Semantic lowering route proof | implemented | passes via Lean build; finite semantic-lowering route coverage only |
| `cognitive-compilation-and-semantic-ir` | Cognitive Compilation and Semantic IR | Incremental repair regression test | planned | not run |
| `cognitive-compilation-and-semantic-ir` | Cognitive Compilation and Semantic IR | Target compilation audit | planned | not run |
| `virtual-context-abi` | The Virtual Context ABI: Typed Pages, Cells, and Certificates | Context ABI fixture validation | implemented | passes via protocol fixture validation; shape only |
| `virtual-context-abi` | The Virtual Context ABI: Typed Pages, Cells, and Certificates | Address/version stability test | implemented | passes through finite Lean context-reference predicates |
| `virtual-context-abi` | The Virtual Context ABI: Typed Pages, Cells, and Certificates | Admission vs adequacy test | implemented | passes via synthetic context admission/adequacy harness; no model verification-bandwidth claim |
| `virtual-context-abi` | The Virtual Context ABI: Typed Pages, Cells, and Certificates | Conflict adequacy classification test | implemented | passes via synthetic context admission/adequacy harness; no adjudication claim |
| `virtual-context-abi` | The Virtual Context ABI: Typed Pages, Cells, and Certificates | Context fault behavior test | implemented | passes via synthetic context admission/adequacy harness; no deployed resolver claim |
| `virtual-context-abi` | The Virtual Context ABI: Typed Pages, Cells, and Certificates | Context admission route proof | implemented | passes via Lean build; finite context-admission route coverage only |
| `virtual-context-abi` | The Virtual Context ABI: Typed Pages, Cells, and Certificates | Semantic page certificate fixture validation | implemented | passes via protocol fixture validation; shape only |
| `virtual-context-abi` | The Virtual Context ABI: Typed Pages, Cells, and Certificates | Certificate completeness test | implemented | passes through finite Lean certificate predicates |
| `virtual-context-abi` | The Virtual Context ABI: Typed Pages, Cells, and Certificates | Authority preservation test | implemented | passes through finite Lean authority predicates |
| `virtual-context-abi` | The Virtual Context ABI: Typed Pages, Cells, and Certificates | Summary fidelity boundary test | implemented | passes via synthetic context admission/adequacy harness for loss/omission gate behavior; no semantic fidelity claim |
| `virtual-context-abi` | The Virtual Context ABI: Typed Pages, Cells, and Certificates | Resolver conformance test | planned | not run |
| `virtual-context-abi` | The Virtual Context ABI: Typed Pages, Cells, and Certificates | Certificate truthfulness test | planned | not run |
| `context-transactions-snapshots-mounts-and-taint` | Context Transactions, Snapshots, Mounts, and Taint | Context transaction fixture validation | implemented | passes via protocol fixture validation; shape only |
| `context-transactions-snapshots-mounts-and-taint` | Context Transactions, Snapshots, Mounts, and Taint | Snapshot read finite-record proof | implemented | builds in AsiStackProofs.ContextTransactions; no memory-store claim |
| `context-transactions-snapshots-mounts-and-taint` | Context Transactions, Snapshots, Mounts, and Taint | Taint propagation finite-record proof | implemented | builds in AsiStackProofs.ContextTransactions; no deployed taint engine claim |
| `context-transactions-snapshots-mounts-and-taint` | Context Transactions, Snapshots, Mounts, and Taint | Deletion closure test | implemented | passes via synthetic context admission/adequacy harness; no memory-store claim |
| `context-transactions-snapshots-mounts-and-taint` | Context Transactions, Snapshots, Mounts, and Taint | Deletion materialization route proof | implemented | passes via Lean build; finite materialization/deletion-closure coverage only |
| `context-transactions-snapshots-mounts-and-taint` | Context Transactions, Snapshots, Mounts, and Taint | Bounded memory-store conformance harness | implemented | passes via synthetic context transaction memory-store harness; no deployed memory-store claim |
| `verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequacy` | Verification Bandwidth and Context Adequacy | Distractor resistance test | planned | not run |
| `verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequacy` | Verification Bandwidth and Context Adequacy | Adequacy labeling test | implemented | passes via synthetic context admission/adequacy harness; no model verification-bandwidth claim |
| `verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequacy` | Verification Bandwidth and Context Adequacy | Verification escalation test | implemented | passes via synthetic context admission/adequacy harness; no deployed escalation claim |
| `verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequacy` | Verification Bandwidth and Context Adequacy | Verification adequacy route proof | implemented | passes via Lean build; finite verification-adequacy route coverage only |
| `claim-ledgers-and-belief-revision` | Claim Ledgers and Belief Revision | Claim extraction test | planned | not run |
| `claim-ledgers-and-belief-revision` | Claim Ledgers and Belief Revision | Contradiction detection test | implemented | passing via synthetic claim ledger revision harness; no open-domain contradiction detection claim |
| `claim-ledgers-and-belief-revision` | Claim Ledgers and Belief Revision | Belief revision test | implemented | passing via synthetic claim ledger revision harness; no deployed belief engine claim |
| `spinoza-verification-and-proof-carrying-claims` | Proof-Carrying Claims and Adversarial Review | Proof artifact presence test | implemented | passing via synthetic proof-carrying claim harness; no theorem-validity or verifier-quality claim |
| `spinoza-verification-and-proof-carrying-claims` | Proof-Carrying Claims and Adversarial Review | Tier assignment test | implemented | passing via synthetic proof-carrying claim harness; no open-domain tier assignment claim |
| `spinoza-verification-and-proof-carrying-claims` | Proof-Carrying Claims and Adversarial Review | Formalization mismatch review | implemented | passing via synthetic proof-carrying claim harness mismatch fixture; no semantic-equivalence guarantee |
| `spinoza-verification-and-proof-carrying-claims` | Proof-Carrying Claims and Adversarial Review | Adversarial review coverage test | implemented | passing via synthetic tribunal review harness; no adversarial-review quality or reviewer-independence claim |
| `spinoza-verification-and-proof-carrying-claims` | Proof-Carrying Claims and Adversarial Review | Dissent preservation test | implemented | passing via synthetic tribunal review harness; no consensus-quality or verdict-correctness claim |
| `spinoza-verification-and-proof-carrying-claims` | Proof-Carrying Claims and Adversarial Review | Consensus evidence test | implemented | passing via synthetic tribunal review harness; no deployed tribunal or runtime-review claim |
| `spinoza-verification-and-proof-carrying-claims` | Proof-Carrying Claims and Adversarial Review | High-risk accepted-verdict negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no reviewer-independence or probe-quality claim |
| `spinoza-verification-and-proof-carrying-claims` | Proof-Carrying Claims and Adversarial Review | Prior-review reuse negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no prior-review adequacy or semantic-equivalence claim |
| `spinoza-verification-and-proof-carrying-claims` | Proof-Carrying Claims and Adversarial Review | Action verdict negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no deployed enforcement or verdict-correctness claim |
| `labor-os-and-typed-jobs` | Labor OS and Typed Jobs | Typed job lifecycle test | implemented | passes via Lean build and synthetic plan-execution contract harness |
| `labor-os-and-typed-jobs` | Labor OS and Typed Jobs | Job execution route proof | implemented | passes via Lean build; finite job-execution route coverage only |
| `labor-os-and-typed-jobs` | Labor OS and Typed Jobs | Tool permission enforcement test | planned | not run |
| `labor-os-and-typed-jobs` | Labor OS and Typed Jobs | Human approval gate test | implemented | passes via Lean build and synthetic approval-bypass fixture; no approval-service claim |
| `artifact-graphs-audit-logs-and-replay` | Artifact Graphs, Audit Logs, and Replay | Artifact traceability test | implemented | passing via Lean traceability predicate, missing-ref negative case, and synthetic artifact graph replay harness; no deployed artifact-service claim |
| `artifact-graphs-audit-logs-and-replay` | Artifact Graphs, Audit Logs, and Replay | Audit reconstruction test | implemented | passing via synthetic artifact graph replay harness and bounded provenance negative cases; no deployed audit-reconstruction claim |
| `artifact-graphs-audit-logs-and-replay` | Artifact Graphs, Audit Logs, and Replay | Replay metadata completeness test | implemented | passing via synthetic artifact graph replay harness and bounded provenance negative cases; no deployed replay-engine claim |
| `runtime-adapters-tool-permissions-and-human-approval` | Runtime Adapters, Tool Permissions, and Human Approval | Adapter permission test | implemented | passes via synthetic runtime adapter permission harness |
| `runtime-adapters-tool-permissions-and-human-approval` | Runtime Adapters, Tool Permissions, and Human Approval | Approval gate enforcement test | implemented | passes via synthetic runtime adapter permission harness |
| `runtime-adapters-tool-permissions-and-human-approval` | Runtime Adapters, Tool Permissions, and Human Approval | Rollback handle capture test | implemented | passes via synthetic runtime adapter permission harness; no real rollback execution claim |
| `procedural-memory-and-cognitive-loop-closure` | Procedural Memory and Cognitive Loop Closure | Loop detection test | implemented | passes via synthetic procedural memory loop harness; no deployed loop detector or tool-synthesis claim |
| `procedural-memory-and-cognitive-loop-closure` | Procedural Memory and Cognitive Loop Closure | Tool abstraction test | implemented | passes via synthetic procedural memory loop harness; no generated-tool correctness claim |
| `procedural-memory-and-cognitive-loop-closure` | Procedural Memory and Cognitive Loop Closure | Verified tool regression test | implemented | passes via synthetic procedural memory loop harness; no deployed regression-quality or routing claim |
| `routing-heads-and-specialist-cores` | Routing Heads and Specialist Cores | Specialist routing accuracy test | planned | not run |
| `routing-heads-and-specialist-cores` | Routing Heads and Specialist Cores | Routing decision lease harness | implemented | passes via synthetic routing decision lease harness; no learned-router, route-quality, MoECOT replay, or deployed authority-enforcement claim |
| `routing-heads-and-specialist-cores` | Routing Heads and Specialist Cores | Authority-bounded routing test | implemented | validated locally by synthetic fixtures; deployed router enforcement not run |
| `routing-heads-and-specialist-cores` | Routing Heads and Specialist Cores | Fallback route test | implemented | validated locally by synthetic fixtures; live fallback routing not run |
| `routing-heads-and-specialist-cores` | Routing Heads and Specialist Cores | MoECOT source-ingestion gate | planned | not run |
| `routing-heads-and-specialist-cores` | Routing Heads and Specialist Cores | Runtime crosswalk completeness test | planned | not run |
| `routing-heads-and-specialist-cores` | Routing Heads and Specialist Cores | Readiness/replay mapping review | partial | readiness mapping validated locally by synthetic fixtures; replay mapping not run |
| `readiness-gates-residual-escrow-and-quarantine` | Readiness Gates, Residual Escrow, and Quarantine | Readiness gate fixture validation | implemented | passes via `python3 scripts/validate_protocol_examples.py`; schema/fixture consistency only |
| `readiness-gates-residual-escrow-and-quarantine` | Readiness Gates, Residual Escrow, and Quarantine | Readiness gate promotion predicate | implemented | passes via Lean build; record-boundary predicate only |
| `readiness-gates-residual-escrow-and-quarantine` | Readiness Gates, Residual Escrow, and Quarantine | Quarantine ordinary-route predicate | implemented | passes via Lean build; no live quarantine routing claim |
| `readiness-gates-residual-escrow-and-quarantine` | Readiness Gates, Residual Escrow, and Quarantine | Failed-gate promotion negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no gate-quality or deployment-readiness claim |
| `readiness-gates-residual-escrow-and-quarantine` | Readiness Gates, Residual Escrow, and Quarantine | Accepted stronger-transition negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no lifecycle-engine behavior claim |
| `readiness-gates-residual-escrow-and-quarantine` | Readiness Gates, Residual Escrow, and Quarantine | Quarantine route-boundary negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no live route-enforcement claim |
| `readiness-gates-residual-escrow-and-quarantine` | Readiness Gates, Residual Escrow, and Quarantine | Stale-gate reuse negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no rerun execution or current-readiness claim |
| `readiness-gates-residual-escrow-and-quarantine` | Readiness Gates, Residual Escrow, and Quarantine | Readiness transition enforcement test | implemented | validated locally by synthetic fixtures; deployed readiness engine not run |
| `readiness-gates-residual-escrow-and-quarantine` | Readiness Gates, Residual Escrow, and Quarantine | Residual escrow integrity test | implemented | validated locally by synthetic fixtures; residual-ledger storage not run |
| `readiness-gates-residual-escrow-and-quarantine` | Readiness Gates, Residual Escrow, and Quarantine | Quarantine routing harness test | implemented | validated locally by synthetic fixtures; live quarantine routing not run |
| `personal-compute-hives-and-federated-edge-intelligence` | Personal Compute Hives and Federated Edge Intelligence | Device registry fixture validation | implemented | passes via protocol fixture validation |
| `personal-compute-hives-and-federated-edge-intelligence` | Personal Compute Hives and Federated Edge Intelligence | Portal, approval, bid, and federation fixture validation | implemented | passes via protocol fixture validation |
| `personal-compute-hives-and-federated-edge-intelligence` | Personal Compute Hives and Federated Edge Intelligence | Policy-first scheduling denial test | implemented | passes via Lean build |
| `personal-compute-hives-and-federated-edge-intelligence` | Personal Compute Hives and Federated Edge Intelligence | Data locality and rented-node denial test | planned | not run |
| `personal-compute-hives-and-federated-edge-intelligence` | Personal Compute Hives and Federated Edge Intelligence | Phone approval gate test | planned | not run |
| `personal-compute-hives-and-federated-edge-intelligence` | Personal Compute Hives and Federated Edge Intelligence | Child topic routing test | planned | not run |
| `personal-compute-hives-and-federated-edge-intelligence` | Personal Compute Hives and Federated Edge Intelligence | External project sandbox contract test | planned | not run |
| `personal-compute-hives-and-federated-edge-intelligence` | Personal Compute Hives and Federated Edge Intelligence | Audit replay test | planned | not run |
| `personal-compute-hives-and-federated-edge-intelligence` | Personal Compute Hives and Federated Edge Intelligence | Cross-router connectivity test | planned | not run |
| `personal-compute-hives-and-federated-edge-intelligence` | Personal Compute Hives and Federated Edge Intelligence | Job bidding test | planned | not run |
| `personal-compute-hives-and-federated-edge-intelligence` | Personal Compute Hives and Federated Edge Intelligence | Device dropout test | planned | not run |
| `personal-compute-hives-and-federated-edge-intelligence` | Personal Compute Hives and Federated Edge Intelligence | Energy-aware scheduling test | planned | not run |
| `personal-compute-hives-and-federated-edge-intelligence` | Personal Compute Hives and Federated Edge Intelligence | Portal continuity test | planned | not run |
| `personal-compute-hives-and-federated-edge-intelligence` | Personal Compute Hives and Federated Edge Intelligence | Bound approval receipt test | implemented | passes via Lean build |
| `personal-compute-hives-and-federated-edge-intelligence` | Personal Compute Hives and Federated Edge Intelligence | Federation lease boundary test | implemented | passes via Lean build |
| `compact-generative-systems-and-residual-honesty` | Compact Generative Systems: Generate, Verify, Repair, and Residual Honesty | Residual honesty negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no behavioral residual-burden measurement claim |
| `compact-generative-systems-and-residual-honesty` | Compact Generative Systems: Generate, Verify, Repair, and Residual Honesty | Lossy exactness negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no codec-correctness or exact-reconstruction claim |
| `compact-generative-systems-and-residual-honesty` | Compact Generative Systems: Generate, Verify, Repair, and Residual Honesty | Exact reconstruction mismatch negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no real reconstruction-quality claim |
| `compact-generative-systems-and-residual-honesty` | Compact Generative Systems: Generate, Verify, Repair, and Residual Honesty | Failed verification promotion negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no verifier-quality or codec-behavior claim |
| `compact-generative-systems-and-residual-honesty` | Compact Generative Systems: Generate, Verify, Repair, and Residual Honesty | Semantic grounded-provenance negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no grounding-quality or semantic-utility claim |
| `compact-generative-systems-and-residual-honesty` | Compact Generative Systems: Generate, Verify, Repair, and Residual Honesty | Semantic hierarchy-supersession negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no downstream hierarchy-migration behavior claim |
| `compact-generative-systems-and-residual-honesty` | Compact Generative Systems: Generate, Verify, Repair, and Residual Honesty | S/R/Q/G/V/E loop consistency test | planned | not run |
| `compact-generative-systems-and-residual-honesty` | Compact Generative Systems: Generate, Verify, Repair, and Residual Honesty | Residual burden test | planned | not run |
| `compact-generative-systems-and-residual-honesty` | Compact Generative Systems: Generate, Verify, Repair, and Residual Honesty | Downstream utility test | planned | not run |
| `compact-generative-systems-and-residual-honesty` | Compact Generative Systems: Generate, Verify, Repair, and Residual Honesty | Fallback behavior test | planned | not run |
| `compact-generative-systems-and-residual-honesty` | Compact Generative Systems: Generate, Verify, Repair, and Residual Honesty | Reconstruction quality test | planned | not run |
| `compact-generative-systems-and-residual-honesty` | Compact Generative Systems: Generate, Verify, Repair, and Residual Honesty | Repair-cost accounting test | planned | not run |
| `compact-generative-systems-and-residual-honesty` | Compact Generative Systems: Generate, Verify, Repair, and Residual Honesty | Bounded-search failure test | planned | not run |
| `compact-generative-systems-and-residual-honesty` | Compact Generative Systems: Generate, Verify, Repair, and Residual Honesty | Grounding fidelity test | planned | not run |
| `compact-generative-systems-and-residual-honesty` | Compact Generative Systems: Generate, Verify, Repair, and Residual Honesty | Hierarchy revision test | planned | not run |
| `compact-generative-systems-and-residual-honesty` | Compact Generative Systems: Generate, Verify, Repair, and Residual Honesty | Representation utility benchmark | planned | not run |
| `compact-generative-systems-and-residual-honesty` | Compact Generative Systems: Generate, Verify, Repair, and Residual Honesty | Consumer-policy test | planned | not run |
| `fast-generation-architectures` | Fast Generation Architectures | Acceleration accounting negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no decoder-speed, verifier-quality, or task-success claim |
| `fast-generation-architectures` | Fast Generation Architectures | Failed-acceptance handling negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no fallback-runtime or repair-quality claim |
| `fast-generation-architectures` | Fast Generation Architectures | High-risk fast-mode review negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no risk-classifier or mode-selector behavior claim |
| `fast-generation-architectures` | Fast Generation Architectures | Autoregressive baseline speed-quality test | planned | not run |
| `fast-generation-architectures` | Fast Generation Architectures | Speculative decoding acceptance test | planned | not run |
| `fast-generation-architectures` | Fast Generation Architectures | Multi-token draft-head acceptance test | planned | not run |
| `fast-generation-architectures` | Fast Generation Architectures | Medusa-style internal-head comparison test | planned | not run |
| `fast-generation-architectures` | Fast Generation Architectures | Diffusion small-model speed-quality curve | planned | not run |
| `fast-generation-architectures` | Fast Generation Architectures | Multi-seed diffusion useful-solution-per-second test | planned | not run |
| `fast-generation-architectures` | Fast Generation Architectures | Hybrid AR-to-diffusion repair test | planned | not run |
| `fast-generation-architectures` | Fast Generation Architectures | Planner-selected generation-mode routing test | planned | not run |
| `fast-generation-architectures` | Fast Generation Architectures | Risk-tiered decoding enforcement test | planned | not run |
| `fast-generation-architectures` | Fast Generation Architectures | KV-cache throughput accounting test | planned | not run |
| `rankfold-neuralfold-and-artifact-compression` | RankFold, NeuralFold, and Artifact Compression | Compression ratio test | planned | not run |
| `rankfold-neuralfold-and-artifact-compression` | RankFold, NeuralFold, and Artifact Compression | Probe-route fallback test | planned | not run |
| `rankfold-neuralfold-and-artifact-compression` | RankFold, NeuralFold, and Artifact Compression | Downstream utility preservation test | planned | not run |
| `resource-economics-and-token-budgets` | Resource Economics and Token Budgets | Generation-mode resource-budget alignment harness | implemented | passing via `python3 scripts/validate_generation_mode_baselines.py` |
| `resource-economics-and-token-budgets` | Resource Economics and Token Budgets | Resource budget ledger harness | implemented | passing via `python3 scripts/validate_resource_budget_ledgers.py` |
| `resource-economics-and-token-budgets` | Resource Economics and Token Budgets | Required budget-gate preservation negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no scheduler-quality or economic-optimality claim |
| `resource-economics-and-token-budgets` | Resource Economics and Token Budgets | High-risk insufficient-budget dispatch negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no real resource-allocation performance claim |
| `resource-economics-and-token-budgets` | Resource Economics and Token Budgets | Budget allocation test | planned | not run |
| `resource-economics-and-token-budgets` | Resource Economics and Token Budgets | Risk-adjusted verification test | planned | not run |
| `resource-economics-and-token-budgets` | Resource Economics and Token Budgets | Capacity smoothing toy harness | implemented | passing via `python3 scripts/validate_capacity_smoothing.py` |
| `resource-economics-and-token-budgets` | Resource Economics and Token Budgets | KV-cache memory accounting scenario | planned | not run |
| `resource-economics-and-token-budgets` | Resource Economics and Token Budgets | Simulation contract record fixture validation | implemented | passing via `python3 scripts/validate_protocol_examples.py` |
| `resource-economics-and-token-budgets` | Resource Economics and Token Budgets | Simulation evidence-field negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no simulator-adequacy or transfer claim |
| `resource-economics-and-token-budgets` | Resource Economics and Token Budgets | Simulation fidelity-overclaim negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no physical-feasibility or open-world-transfer claim |
| `resource-economics-and-token-budgets` | Resource Economics and Token Budgets | Fidelity declaration test | implemented | passing via `python3 scripts/validate_simulation_transfer_boundaries.py`; no simulator-adequacy or physical-feasibility claim |
| `resource-economics-and-token-budgets` | Resource Economics and Token Budgets | Resource-bound simulation sanity check | implemented | passing via `python3 scripts/validate_simulation_transfer_boundaries.py`; deterministic fixture discipline only |
| `resource-economics-and-token-budgets` | Resource Economics and Token Budgets | Simulation approximation audit | implemented | passing via `python3 scripts/validate_simulation_transfer_boundaries.py`; no support-state promotion |
| `mathematical-and-search-substrates` | Mathematical and Search Substrates | Required-field negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no substrate-quality claim |
| `mathematical-and-search-substrates` | Mathematical and Search Substrates | Unproven qualified-state negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no core-substrate promotion claim |
| `mathematical-and-search-substrates` | Mathematical and Search Substrates | Qualified-without-evidence negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no empirical substrate result |
| `mathematical-and-search-substrates` | Mathematical and Search Substrates | Consumer-axis negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no routing, compression, or reasoning-quality claim |
| `mathematical-and-search-substrates` | Mathematical and Search Substrates | Canary evidence-packet negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no canary benchmark claim |
| `mathematical-and-search-substrates` | Mathematical and Search Substrates | Baseline comparison test | planned | not run |
| `mathematical-and-search-substrates` | Mathematical and Search Substrates | Representation efficiency test | planned | not run |
| `mathematical-and-search-substrates` | Mathematical and Search Substrates | Falsification review | planned | not run |
| `mathematical-and-search-substrates` | Mathematical and Search Substrates | Sequence-substrate A/B comparison test | planned | not run |
| `circle-calculus-and-proof-carrying-ai-contracts` | Circle Calculus and Proof-Carrying AI Contracts | Proof target record fixture validation | implemented | passes via `python3 scripts/validate_protocol_examples.py`; proof-record schema consistency only |
| `circle-calculus-and-proof-carrying-ai-contracts` | Circle Calculus and Proof-Carrying AI Contracts | Proof contract receipt record fixture validation | implemented | passes via `python3 scripts/validate_protocol_examples.py`; receipt-record schema consistency only |
| `circle-calculus-and-proof-carrying-ai-contracts` | Circle Calculus and Proof-Carrying AI Contracts | Circle public consumer-gate validation | implemented | passes via `python3 scripts/validate_circle_public_replay.py`; no local Circle replay or downstream model-quality claim |
| `circle-calculus-and-proof-carrying-ai-contracts` | Circle Calculus and Proof-Carrying AI Contracts | Receipt boundary Lean predicate | implemented | passes via Lean build; record-boundary predicate only |
| `circle-calculus-and-proof-carrying-ai-contracts` | Circle Calculus and Proof-Carrying AI Contracts | Consumer gate promotion predicate | implemented | passes via Lean build; no workload or model-quality claim |
| `circle-calculus-and-proof-carrying-ai-contracts` | Circle Calculus and Proof-Carrying AI Contracts | Missing receipt-boundary negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no theorem-resolution or replay claim |
| `circle-calculus-and-proof-carrying-ai-contracts` | Circle Calculus and Proof-Carrying AI Contracts | Contract-readiness promotion negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no consumer acceptance or quality claim |
| `circle-calculus-and-proof-carrying-ai-contracts` | Circle Calculus and Proof-Carrying AI Contracts | Stale or unsupported consumer-gate negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no transfer or support-state claim |
| `circle-calculus-and-proof-carrying-ai-contracts` | Circle Calculus and Proof-Carrying AI Contracts | Replay artifact negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no replay execution claim |
| `circle-calculus-and-proof-carrying-ai-contracts` | Circle Calculus and Proof-Carrying AI Contracts | Contract schema validation test | planned | not run |
| `circle-calculus-and-proof-carrying-ai-contracts` | Circle Calculus and Proof-Carrying AI Contracts | Theorem-id resolution test | planned | not run |
| `circle-calculus-and-proof-carrying-ai-contracts` | Circle Calculus and Proof-Carrying AI Contracts | Non-claim preservation test | planned | not run |
| `circle-calculus-and-proof-carrying-ai-contracts` | Circle Calculus and Proof-Carrying AI Contracts | Receipt replay and fingerprint test | planned | not run |
| `coil-attention-cyclic-memory-and-recurrence-contracts` | Coil Attention, Cyclic Memory, and Recurrence Contracts | Hidden alias negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no alias behavior or retrieval-quality claim |
| `coil-attention-cyclic-memory-and-recurrence-contracts` | Coil Attention, Cyclic Memory, and Recurrence Contracts | Structure-only quality-promotion negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no retrieval-quality claim |
| `coil-attention-cyclic-memory-and-recurrence-contracts` | Coil Attention, Cyclic Memory, and Recurrence Contracts | Recurrence admission negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no recurrence-exit behavior claim |
| `coil-attention-cyclic-memory-and-recurrence-contracts` | Coil Attention, Cyclic Memory, and Recurrence Contracts | Stale-read residual negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no KV-cache freshness behavior claim |
| `coil-attention-cyclic-memory-and-recurrence-contracts` | Coil Attention, Cyclic Memory, and Recurrence Contracts | Cyclic alias visibility test | implemented | passing via `python3 scripts/validate_cyclic_memory_contracts.py`; synthetic structural traces only |
| `coil-attention-cyclic-memory-and-recurrence-contracts` | Coil Attention, Cyclic Memory, and Recurrence Contracts | Sparse coverage gap test | implemented | passing via `python3 scripts/validate_cyclic_memory_contracts.py`; no sparse-attention behavior or quality claim |
| `coil-attention-cyclic-memory-and-recurrence-contracts` | Coil Attention, Cyclic Memory, and Recurrence Contracts | Recurrence budget and exit test | implemented | passing via `python3 scripts/validate_cyclic_memory_contracts.py`; no recurrence-quality or runtime claim |
| `coil-attention-cyclic-memory-and-recurrence-contracts` | Coil Attention, Cyclic Memory, and Recurrence Contracts | Freshness stale-read rejection test | implemented | passing via `python3 scripts/validate_cyclic_memory_contracts.py`; no KV-cache freshness or retrieval-quality claim |
| `coilra-multicoil-rope-and-cyclic-mixers` | CoilRA, MultiCoil RoPE, and Cyclic Mixers | Claim-partition negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no model-quality, runtime, memory, or parameter-efficiency claim |
| `coilra-multicoil-rope-and-cyclic-mixers` | CoilRA, MultiCoil RoPE, and Cyclic Mixers | Baseline/tradeoff promotion negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no adoption or quality claim |
| `coilra-multicoil-rope-and-cyclic-mixers` | CoilRA, MultiCoil RoPE, and Cyclic Mixers | Residue/winding alias negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no alias-behavior or long-context claim |
| `coilra-multicoil-rope-and-cyclic-mixers` | CoilRA, MultiCoil RoPE, and Cyclic Mixers | Tradeoff-packet negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no measured tradeoff claim |
| `coilra-multicoil-rope-and-cyclic-mixers` | CoilRA, MultiCoil RoPE, and Cyclic Mixers | Hardware-refusal negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no hardware-kernel benchmark claim |
| `coilra-multicoil-rope-and-cyclic-mixers` | CoilRA, MultiCoil RoPE, and Cyclic Mixers | RoPE receipt boundary test | planned | not run |
| `coilra-multicoil-rope-and-cyclic-mixers` | CoilRA, MultiCoil RoPE, and Cyclic Mixers | Cyclic mixer baseline matrix test | planned | not run |
| `coilra-multicoil-rope-and-cyclic-mixers` | CoilRA, MultiCoil RoPE, and Cyclic Mixers | Residue/winding alias diagnostic | planned | not run |
| `coilra-multicoil-rope-and-cyclic-mixers` | CoilRA, MultiCoil RoPE, and Cyclic Mixers | Parameter-quality-runtime separation test | planned | not run |
| `executable-specifications-and-lean-proof-envelope` | Executable Specifications and Lean Proof Envelope | Proof target record fixture validation | implemented | passes via protocol fixture validation |
| `executable-specifications-and-lean-proof-envelope` | Executable Specifications and Lean Proof Envelope | Proof manifest sync test | implemented | passes via proof manifest check |
| `executable-specifications-and-lean-proof-envelope` | Executable Specifications and Lean Proof Envelope | Lake build smoke test | implemented | passes via Lean build |
| `executable-specifications-and-lean-proof-envelope` | Executable Specifications and Lean Proof Envelope | Implemented-target missing artifact/build negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no filesystem discovery or proof-adequacy claim |
| `executable-specifications-and-lean-proof-envelope` | Executable Specifications and Lean Proof Envelope | Non-Lean artifact proof-laundering negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no claim about artifact semantic adequacy |
| `executable-specifications-and-lean-proof-envelope` | Executable Specifications and Lean Proof Envelope | Support-promotion boundary negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no Appendix C or chapter-core promotion |
| `executable-specifications-and-lean-proof-envelope` | Executable Specifications and Lean Proof Envelope | External theorem reference boundary negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no external theorem ownership or transfer claim |
| `executable-specifications-and-lean-proof-envelope` | Executable Specifications and Lean Proof Envelope | Proof target coverage summary | implemented | passes via proof readiness validation |
| `executable-specifications-and-lean-proof-envelope` | Executable Specifications and Lean Proof Envelope | Proof artifact traceability audit | implemented | passes via proof artifact audit |
| `executable-specifications-and-lean-proof-envelope` | Executable Specifications and Lean Proof Envelope | Semantic proof adequacy audit | planned | not run |
| `benchmark-ratchets-and-anti-goodhart-evidence` | Benchmark Ratchets and Anti-Goodhart Evidence | Saturation detection test | implemented | validated locally by synthetic fixtures |
| `benchmark-ratchets-and-anti-goodhart-evidence` | Benchmark Ratchets and Anti-Goodhart Evidence | Hidden benchmark transfer test | implemented | validated locally by synthetic fixtures; no hidden benchmark run |
| `benchmark-ratchets-and-anti-goodhart-evidence` | Benchmark Ratchets and Anti-Goodhart Evidence | Regression preservation test | implemented | validated locally by synthetic fixtures; no empirical regression suite run |
| `policy-optimization-and-learning-from-feedback` | Policy Optimization and Learning from Feedback | DPO/offline preference baseline test | planned | not run |
| `policy-optimization-and-learning-from-feedback` | Policy Optimization and Learning from Feedback | PPO online RL baseline test | planned | not run |
| `policy-optimization-and-learning-from-feedback` | Policy Optimization and Learning from Feedback | GRPO/RLOO toy math reward test | planned | not run |
| `policy-optimization-and-learning-from-feedback` | Policy Optimization and Learning from Feedback | Verifier reward loop test | planned | not run |
| `policy-optimization-and-learning-from-feedback` | Policy Optimization and Learning from Feedback | Length and latency penalty study | planned | not run |
| `policy-optimization-and-learning-from-feedback` | Policy Optimization and Learning from Feedback | Reward-source admissibility test | implemented | validated locally by synthetic fixtures; no policy optimization run |
| `policy-optimization-and-learning-from-feedback` | Policy Optimization and Learning from Feedback | Reward hacking probe test | implemented | validated locally by synthetic fixtures; no reward-hacking experiment run |
| `policy-optimization-and-learning-from-feedback` | Policy Optimization and Learning from Feedback | Holdout and contamination negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no hidden-holdout or contamination-detection claim |
| `policy-optimization-and-learning-from-feedback` | Policy Optimization and Learning from Feedback | Reward-proxy target-evaluation negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no reward-quality or task-success claim |
| `policy-optimization-and-learning-from-feedback` | Policy Optimization and Learning from Feedback | Authority-expansion negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no approval-quality or rollback-execution claim |
| `policy-optimization-and-learning-from-feedback` | Policy Optimization and Learning from Feedback | Policy-promotion route negative case | implemented | passes via Lean route negative cases; no policy-improvement, reward-quality, or deployment claim |
| `policy-optimization-and-learning-from-feedback` | Policy Optimization and Learning from Feedback | Router policy toy RL test | planned | not run |
| `policy-optimization-and-learning-from-feedback` | Policy Optimization and Learning from Feedback | Context-policy grounding reward test | planned | not run |
| `policy-optimization-and-learning-from-feedback` | Policy Optimization and Learning from Feedback | Reasoning-budget penalty test | planned | not run |
| `policy-optimization-and-learning-from-feedback` | Policy Optimization and Learning from Feedback | Rollback and promotion gate test | implemented | validated locally by synthetic fixtures; no live rollback or policy canary run |
| `artifact-steward-agents-and-living-project-governance` | Artifact Steward Agents and Living Project Governance | Project steward manifest fixture validation | implemented | passes via protocol fixture validation |
| `artifact-steward-agents-and-living-project-governance` | Artifact Steward Agents and Living Project Governance | Treasury policy and event-taint fixture validation | implemented | passes via protocol fixture validation |
| `artifact-steward-agents-and-living-project-governance` | Artifact Steward Agents and Living Project Governance | Work contract authority denial test | implemented | passes via Lean build |
| `artifact-steward-agents-and-living-project-governance` | Artifact Steward Agents and Living Project Governance | Treasury spend-cap test | implemented | passes via Lean build |
| `artifact-steward-agents-and-living-project-governance` | Artifact Steward Agents and Living Project Governance | Untrusted event taint test | implemented | passes via Lean build |
| `artifact-steward-agents-and-living-project-governance` | Artifact Steward Agents and Living Project Governance | Contribution ledger separation test | planned | not run |
| `artifact-steward-agents-and-living-project-governance` | Artifact Steward Agents and Living Project Governance | Sunset criteria test | implemented | passes via Lean build |
| `artifact-steward-agents-and-living-project-governance` | Artifact Steward Agents and Living Project Governance | Release evidence handoff test | implemented | validated locally by synthetic fixtures; no steward release run |
| `artifact-steward-agents-and-living-project-governance` | Artifact Steward Agents and Living Project Governance | Project federation contract test | planned | not run |
| `artifact-steward-agents-and-living-project-governance` | Artifact Steward Agents and Living Project Governance | Autonomy-mode transition test | implemented | passes via Lean build |
| `artifact-steward-agents-and-living-project-governance` | Artifact Steward Agents and Living Project Governance | Release evidence gate test | implemented | passes via Lean build |
| `artifact-steward-agents-and-living-project-governance` | Artifact Steward Agents and Living Project Governance | Sunset ordinary-work block test | implemented | passes via Lean build |
| `integrated-reference-architecture` | Integrated Reference Architecture | End-to-end intent trace test | implemented | passing via `python3 scripts/validate_reference_trace.py` |
| `integrated-reference-architecture` | Integrated Reference Architecture | Artifact continuity audit | implemented | passing via `python3 scripts/validate_reference_trace.py` |
| `integrated-reference-architecture` | Integrated Reference Architecture | Authority stop-condition test | implemented | passing via `python3 scripts/validate_reference_trace.py` |
| `project-theseus-as-report-first-implementation-reference` | Project Theseus as Report-First Implementation Reference | Theseus report crosswalk fixture validation | implemented | passes via `python3 scripts/validate_protocol_examples.py`; schema/fixture consistency only |
| `project-theseus-as-report-first-implementation-reference` | Project Theseus as Report-First Implementation Reference | Static architecture-gate import validation | implemented | passes via `python3 scripts/validate_theseus_report.py`; no live replay or support-state promotion |
| `project-theseus-as-report-first-implementation-reference` | Project Theseus as Report-First Implementation Reference | Dashboard-only implementation-reference negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no dashboard-state or report-truth claim |
| `project-theseus-as-report-first-implementation-reference` | Project Theseus as Report-First Implementation Reference | Missing/failing gate promotion negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no gate-quality or self-evolution-safety claim |
| `project-theseus-as-report-first-implementation-reference` | Project Theseus as Report-First Implementation Reference | Imported report-bundle completeness negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no report-bundle import or replay claim |
| `project-theseus-as-report-first-implementation-reference` | Project Theseus as Report-First Implementation Reference | Replay-readiness boundary negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no replay execution claim |
| `project-theseus-as-report-first-implementation-reference` | Project Theseus as Report-First Implementation Reference | Public-safe artifact boundary negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no publication approval or support-state promotion |
| `project-theseus-as-report-first-implementation-reference` | Project Theseus as Report-First Implementation Reference | Report-bundle completeness test | planned | not run |
| `project-theseus-as-report-first-implementation-reference` | Project Theseus as Report-First Implementation Reference | Replay-readiness test | planned | not run |
| `project-theseus-as-report-first-implementation-reference` | Project Theseus as Report-First Implementation Reference | Theseus report crosswalk completeness test | planned | not run |
| `project-theseus-as-report-first-implementation-reference` | Project Theseus as Report-First Implementation Reference | Architecture gate mapping test | planned | not run |
| `project-theseus-as-report-first-implementation-reference` | Project Theseus as Report-First Implementation Reference | Work-board improvement contract test | planned | not run |
| `project-theseus-as-report-first-implementation-reference` | Project Theseus as Report-First Implementation Reference | Artifact-gap audit | planned | not run |
| `project-theseus-as-report-first-implementation-reference` | Project Theseus as Report-First Implementation Reference | Self-evolution intervention ladder audit | planned | not run |
| `prototype-roadmap` | Prototype Roadmap | Phase acceptance checklist | planned | not run |
| `prototype-roadmap` | Prototype Roadmap | Dependency gate review | planned | not run |
| `prototype-roadmap` | Prototype Roadmap | Prototype evidence-state audit | implemented | validated locally by synthetic fixtures; full phase acceptance audit not run |
| `living-book-methodology` | Living Book Methodology | Living book release record validation | implemented | passes via `python3 scripts/validate_protocol_examples.py`; release hygiene only |
| `living-book-methodology` | Living Book Methodology | Quarto render check | implemented | validated locally by `quarto render --to html`; no site-availability or manuscript-quality claim |
| `living-book-methodology` | Living Book Methodology | Reading-mode toggle check | implemented | passes via `python3 scripts/validate_reading_mode_toggle.py`; no reader-artifact approval |
| `living-book-methodology` | Living Book Methodology | Manifest/outline consistency check | implemented | passes via `python3 scripts/validate_outline_consistency.py`; no source-interpretation proof |
| `living-book-methodology` | Living Book Methodology | Manifest artifact negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no editorial-completeness claim |
| `living-book-methodology` | Living Book Methodology | Structural sync negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no publication-quality claim |
| `living-book-methodology` | Living Book Methodology | Release readiness negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no release approval beyond recorded artifacts |
| `living-book-methodology` | Living Book Methodology | Derived artifact boundary negative case | implemented | passes via Lean negative case; no ebook, PDF, DOCX, or audio artifact approval |
| `open-research-agenda-and-bibliography-plan` | Open Research Agenda and Bibliography Plan | Source inventory validation test | planned | not run |
| `open-research-agenda-and-bibliography-plan` | Open Research Agenda and Bibliography Plan | Source-note backlog audit | planned | not run |
| `open-research-agenda-and-bibliography-plan` | Open Research Agenda and Bibliography Plan | Source-derived claim evidence gate | implemented | passes via Lean source-record negative case; no citation-accuracy or source-interpretation claim |
| `open-research-agenda-and-bibliography-plan` | Open Research Agenda and Bibliography Plan | New-source assignment gate | implemented | passes via Lean nonexistent-chapter negative case; no real new-paper triage-quality claim |
| `open-research-agenda-and-bibliography-plan` | Open Research Agenda and Bibliography Plan | New-paper triage scenario | implemented | validated locally |

## Repository-Level Implemented Checks

| Check | Command | Scope | Result policy |
|---|---|---|---|
| Protocol schema and release-record validation | `python3 scripts/validate_protocol_examples.py` | Validates example records in `tests/fixtures/protocol_records/` and public release records in `release_records/` against matching schemas in `schemas/`. | Passing this check proves fixture/release-record schema consistency only; it does not promote chapter claims or replace the chapter-level tests above. |
| Claim ledger revision harness | `python3 scripts/validate_claim_ledger_revision.py` | Checks synthetic claim-ledger and belief-revision fixtures for no-change boundaries, contradiction quarantine, claim splitting, support-state promotion blockers, revision-history preservation, surface propagation, review routing, residuals, and non-claim boundaries. | Passing this check proves synthetic claim-ledger record discipline only; it does not prove source interpretation, runtime behavior, verifier quality, open-domain claim extraction, or belief-engine correctness. |
| Proof-carrying claim harness | `python3 scripts/validate_proof_carrying_claims.py` | Checks synthetic proof-carrying-claim fixtures for verifier artifact refs, tier/justification alignment, bounded review eligibility, failed-attempt preservation, mismatch escalation, and non-claim boundaries. | Passing this check proves synthetic proof-carrying record discipline only; it does not prove theorem validity, semantic equivalence, citation accuracy, verifier quality, runtime behavior, or open-domain formalization. |
| Tribunal review harness | `python3 scripts/validate_tribunal_review.py` | Checks synthetic tribunal-review fixtures for dossier refs, reviewer roles, adversarial probes, evidence-backed accept verdicts, dissent preservation, prior-review guards, required actions, constraint effects, and non-claim boundaries. | Passing this check proves synthetic tribunal-review record discipline only; it does not prove reviewer independence, adversarial-review quality, consensus quality, verdict correctness, runtime behavior, or source interpretation. |
| Value conflict harness | `python3 scripts/validate_value_conflicts.py` | Checks synthetic value-conflict fixtures for multi-axis classification, stakeholder and evidence requirements, high-stakes review routing, residual uncertainty preservation, authority narrowing, dissent payloads, and bounded-decision revisit conditions. | Passing this check proves synthetic value-conflict record discipline only; it does not prove moral correctness, classification quality, reviewer independence, human-review quality, tribunal quality, runtime policy behavior, or source interpretation. |
| Constitutional alignment harness | `python3 scripts/validate_constitutional_alignment.py` | Checks synthetic constitutional-predicate fixtures for protected scope, operational tests, conflict routing, review routes, self-modification weakening rules, migration policies, least-sufficient-power behavior, uncertainty preservation, and non-claim boundaries. | Passing this check proves synthetic constitutional-predicate record discipline only; it does not prove deployed constitutional alignment, moral correctness, runtime policy behavior, source interpretation, self-modification safety, predicate-translation adequacy, or review quality. |
| Governance rights harness | `python3 scripts/validate_governance_rights.py` | Checks synthetic governance-right fixtures for audit material and receipts, denied/redacted appeal paths, materially usable exit and fork access paths, fork safety constraints, preservation obligations, durable record paths, and non-claim boundaries. | Passing this check proves synthetic governance-right record discipline only; it does not prove institutional governance rights, legal rights, runtime right enforcement, deployed fork/exit usability, reviewer independence, or source interpretation. |
| Agency rights harness | `python3 scripts/validate_agency_rights.py` | Checks synthetic agency-right checklist fixtures for affected parties, bounded delegation, material usability, timing-before-effect review, review and appeal channels, corrigibility paths, high-impact approval, residual dependency risk, degradation reasons, and accountable principals. | Passing this check proves synthetic agency-right checklist discipline only; it does not prove deployed agency preservation, dignity preservation, manipulation resistance, consent quality, reviewer independence, runtime policy behavior, or source interpretation. |
| Support-state transition harness | `python3 scripts/validate_support_state_transitions.py` | Checks synthetic valid and expected-invalid evidence-transition records for no-change conservatism, upward-transition review gates, downward demotion records, terminal refutation records, required evidence refs, and failed-verification blockers. | Passing this check proves transition-gate behavior for synthetic fixtures only; it does not promote, demote, deprecate, or refute Appendix C claims, prove source interpretation, or validate AI runtime behavior. |
| Authority transition harness | `python3 scripts/validate_authority_transitions.py` | Checks synthetic authority-transition records for non-escalation, permission separation, denial receipts, review escalation, and expected-invalid confused-deputy shortcuts. | Passing this check proves authority-gate behavior for synthetic fixtures only; it does not prove deployed permission enforcement, runtime adapter safety, secret handling, or revocation propagation. |
| Security kernel harness | `python3 scripts/validate_security_kernel.py` | Checks synthetic authority-use receipt fixtures for handle mediation, approval artifacts, bounded action scope, SCIF lifecycle completeness, sanitization, residual leak-risk notes, revocation paths, and prompt-injection non-disclosure boundaries. | Passing this check proves synthetic security-kernel receipt discipline only; it does not prove kernel security, sandbox isolation, side-channel safety, prompt-injection containment, secret-handle safety, least-privilege context behavior, runtime policy behavior, or source interpretation. |
| Stable capability fields harness | `python3 scripts/validate_stable_capability_fields.py` | Checks synthetic stable-capability-field fixtures for qualification predicates, evidence refs, readiness refs, authority ceilings, route permission effects, evaluator independence, rollback obligations, default-route blockers, and non-claim boundaries. | Passing this check proves synthetic stable-capability-field record discipline only; it does not prove runtime route validity, capability identity, evaluator integrity, authority enforcement, replacement safety, rollback execution, or source interpretation. |
| Capability replacement harness | `python3 scripts/validate_capability_replacement.py` | Checks synthetic replacement-transaction fixtures for field identity, qualification evidence, regression results, non-widening authority checks, evaluator separation, residual escrow, rollback receipts, approvals, monitor state, promotion blockers, and non-claim boundaries. | Passing this check proves synthetic replacement-transaction record discipline only; it does not prove deployed replacement behavior, runtime route quality, evaluator integrity, authority enforcement, rollback execution, regression quality, or source interpretation. |
| Self-improvement boundary harness | `python3 scripts/validate_self_improvement_boundaries.py` | Checks synthetic self-improvement transition fixtures for protected invariants, evaluator separation, cheaper-intervention ordering, authority non-widening, governance review, monitor windows, rollback paths, and no-promotion language. | Passing this check proves synthetic self-improvement transition-record discipline only; it does not prove deployed self-improvement behavior, runtime optimization, evaluator integrity, authority enforcement, rollback execution, regression quality, recursive self-improvement safety, or source interpretation. |
| Plan-execution contract harness | `python3 scripts/validate_plan_execution_contracts.py` | Checks synthetic command-contract, plan-graph, DAG, semantic-atom, and typed-job scenarios for cross-record contract consistency, acyclic dependency order, dispatch receipts, requirement preservation, artifact traceability, and approval gating. | Passing this check proves synthetic cross-record gate behavior only; it does not prove planner quality, scheduler behavior, deployed execution, runtime adapter safety, parser quality, or benchmark performance. |
| Runtime adapter permission harness | `python3 scripts/validate_runtime_adapter_permissions.py` | Checks synthetic typed-job, runtime-adapter-invocation, and authority-use-receipt scenarios for permission coverage, high-impact approval gating, approval expiry markers, effect receipts, rollback handles, irreversible residuals, and authority receipt alignment. | Passing this check proves synthetic adapter-record gate behavior only; it does not prove deployed adapter behavior, sandbox isolation, approval-service quality, secret-handle safety, rollback execution, or runtime behavior. |
| Context admission/adequacy harness | `python3 scripts/validate_context_admission_adequacy.py` | Checks synthetic context ABI, packet, semantic-page certificate, transaction, and adequacy scenarios for admission/adequacy separation, conflict blocking, stale certificate rejection, deletion closure, escalation, and mode-confusion gates. | Passing this check proves synthetic context-record gate behavior only; it does not prove VCM resolver behavior, context compiler behavior, memory-store correctness, summary fidelity, model verification bandwidth, or benchmark performance. |
| Context transaction memory-store harness | `python3 scripts/validate_context_transaction_memory_store.py` | Checks bounded context-transaction and synthetic memory-event fixtures for committed-read visibility, mount faults, branch isolation, deletion-closure/materialization blocking, taint/declassification, replay boundaries, and support-state non-promotion. | Passing this check proves bounded fixture behavior only; it does not prove deployed memory-store correctness, VCM resolver behavior, runtime branch isolation, mount enforcement outside the fixture, side-channel safety, VCM-Bench performance, or support-state promotion. |
| Readiness/residual gate harness | `python3 scripts/validate_readiness_residual_gates.py` | Checks synthetic costed-route, readiness-gate, and replacement-transaction scenarios for promotion gates, residual escrow custody, quarantine, authority bounds, expired-evidence reruns, fallback, and rollback readiness. | Passing this check proves synthetic cross-record gate behavior only; it does not prove routing accuracy, readiness-engine behavior, residual-ledger storage, rollback execution, runtime monitoring, MoECOT replay, or benchmark performance. |
| Benchmark anti-Goodhart harness | `python3 scripts/validate_benchmark_antigoodhart.py` | Checks synthetic benchmark-ratchet, policy-optimization, and steward-action scenarios for holdout/contamination/mutation or transfer checks, saturated-benchmark regression floors, blocked-ratchet policy promotion, reward-as-truth confusion, and release approval evidence. | Passing this check proves synthetic cross-record gate behavior only; it does not prove benchmark quality, hidden-holdout integrity, policy-training quality, reward-hacking resistance, steward-agent behavior, release safety, or runtime behavior. |
| Generation mode baseline harness | `python3 scripts/validate_generation_mode_baselines.py` | Checks deterministic generation-mode and resource-budget scenarios for run, baseline, and negative-control refs, useful-solution-per-second plus quality and residual metrics, fallback behavior, resource-budget alignment, latency-only proxy rejection, and no-promotion boundaries. | Passing this check proves deterministic fixture-accounting behavior only; it does not prove generation speed, speculative decoding quality, diffusion generation quality, KV-cache throughput, routing quality, model quality, useful-solution-per-second performance, or runtime behavior. |
| Resource budget ledger harness | `python3 scripts/validate_resource_budget_ledgers.py` | Checks deterministic Resource Budget Record scenarios for dispatch, high-risk escalation, protected overhead, displaced-cost residualization, review-capacity hoarding, evidence refs, and no-promotion boundaries. | Passing this check proves deterministic budget-ledger fixture behavior only; it does not prove scheduler behavior, load stability, verification-tax optimization, KV-cache or serving behavior, runtime budget enforcement, or economic outcomes. |
| Capacity smoothing toy harness | `python3 scripts/validate_capacity_smoothing.py` | Checks deterministic toy capacity traces for bounded regeneration arithmetic, priority deferral under blocked high-risk work, scope reduction, overload rejection, and no-promotion boundaries. | Passing this check proves toy trace consistency only; it does not prove TokenMana behavior, scheduler behavior, load stability, review-queue optimization, runtime behavior, human outcomes, or economic outcomes. |
| Phase 5 harness registry validation | `python3 scripts/validate_phase5_harness_registry.py` | Checks that the Phase 5 harness set has commands, scripts, docs, fixture counts, result records, Appendix E rows, public status references, main-validation wiring, primary chapter mappings, and explicit non-claim boundaries. | Passing this check proves harness traceability only; it does not run the harnesses, prove runtime behavior, promote support states, or validate benchmark quality. |
| Reader continuity audit | `python3 scripts/audit_reader_continuity.py --check` | Derives the reader edition in a temporary workspace and checks that the tracked Phase 2 continuity audit is current, including reader word counts, overlay counts, density signals, table/code/diagram counts, repeated-opening heuristics, and a priority queue for human review. | Passing this check proves the audit report is current only; it is not a manual reader review, reader release, ebook/document/PDF artifact, audio artifact, or support-state promotion. |
| Proof-readiness validation | `python3 scripts/validate_proof_readiness.py` | Checks that proof triage tags, modules, root imports, formal targets, and target statuses stay aligned with the generated proof manifest. | Passing this check proves manifest/triage/import consistency only; theorem status still requires implemented Lean modules and a passing Lean build. |
| Proof artifact traceability audit | `python3 scripts/validate_proof_artifact_audit.py` | Checks that implemented proof targets are traceable from manifest and triage to Lean modules, root imports, chapter hooks, limitation prose, and Appendix E coverage. | Passing this check proves traceability and explicit non-claim coverage only; it does not prove semantic adequacy, source interpretation, deployed enforcement, or benchmark performance. |
| Source evidence traceability audit | `python3 scripts/validate_source_evidence_audit.py` | Checks that assigned source/chapter pairs, source notes, chapter listings, and claim-source mappings stay aligned, and reports passage-review coverage. | Passing this check proves source-note/mapping consistency only; it does not quote private passages or promote any support state. |
| Proof target coverage summary | Generated by `python3 scripts/sync_scaffold.py` from `proofs/proof_triage.json`; checked by `python3 scripts/validate_proof_readiness.py`. | Publishes the current count of proof targets by status, triage class, and recommended route. | Passing the validator proves coverage/accounting consistency only; it does not prove broad chapter claims, source interpretation, model quality, deployed enforcement, or benchmark performance. |
| Repeated prose validation | `python3 scripts/validate_repeated_prose.py` | Checks chapter files for exact repeated long prose paragraphs and known formulaic chapter phrases that indicate template-shaped drafting. | Passing this check proves only that exact repeated long paragraphs and known formulaic phrases are absent; it is not a full editorial review. |
| Visual coverage validation | `python3 scripts/validate_visual_coverage.py` | Checks that every chapter has at least one substantive Mermaid diagram with enough lines, edges, nodes, and labeled transitions, and that the landing page references the hero image asset. | Passing this check proves visual coverage only; it does not prove the diagrams are complete or promote chapter claims. |

## Proof Target Coverage Audit

This section is generated from `proofs/proof_triage.json`. It records coverage and routing state only: it does not prove broad chapter claims, source interpretation, model quality, deployed enforcement, or benchmark performance.

`python3 scripts/validate_proof_readiness.py` checks that these triage records stay aligned with `proofs/proof_manifest.json`, imported Lean modules, and implemented target statuses.

| Metric | Count |
|---|---:|
| Proof targets covered by triage | 123 |

### Coverage by Status

| Target status | Count |
|---|---:|
| implemented | 123 |

### Coverage by Route

| Target status | Triage class | Recommended route | Count |
|---|---|---|---:|
| implemented | formal-invariant | lean-candidate | 123 |
